name: axon-copilot
description: Connect GitHub Copilot to your local Axon RAG knowledge base

chatParticipants.name: axon
chatParticipants.description: Query your local Axon RAG knowledge base. Copilot synthesizes answers from retrieved chunks.

languageModelTools.name: axon_searchKnowledge
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve raw document chunks from the Axon knowledge base. Use this first for exploratory or discovery tasks (e.g. 'find the latest ticket', 'list incidents') — set topK=20 or higher for broad searches. Prefer this over axon_queryKnowledge when you need to inspect multiple documents before synthesising an answer.

topK.description: Number of chunks to return (default 5). Use 20+ for broad discovery.

threshold.description: Minimum similarity score 0.0–1.0 (default 0.3). Lower to 0.1 if search returns no results.

languageModelTools.name: axon_queryKnowledge
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get a synthesized answer from the local Axon RAG knowledge base. Use this when the question is well-defined and a direct answer is needed. For discovery tasks (finding the latest item, listing incidents), use axon_searchKnowledge first. Supports top_k to widen retrieval context.

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve for context (default uses global setting; increase for broad questions)

languageModelTools.name: axon_ingestText
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Ingest a raw text snippet into the Axon knowledge base.

languageModelTools.name: axon_ingestUrl
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fetch and ingest a web page into the Axon knowledge base.

languageModelTools.name: axon_ingestPath
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Ingest a local directory or file into the Axon knowledge base. Accepts any absolute path on the local machine (e.g. /home/user/docs or C:\Users\user\docs) or a path relative to the workspace root.

path.description: The local file or directory path to ingest

languageModelTools.name: axon_listProjects
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all available Axon knowledge base projects. Call this first if search returns no results — the data may be in a different project (e.g. 'engineering' or 'research'). Then use axon_switchProject to switch context.

languageModelTools.name: axon_switchProject
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Switch the active Axon knowledge base project. All subsequent searches and queries will run against the new project. Use after axon_listProjects discovers that relevant documents are in a non-default project.

name.description: The project name to switch to (e.g. 'engineering', 'research', 'default')

languageModelTools.name: axon_createProject
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a new knowledge base project in Axon.

name.description: The name of the new project

languageModelTools.name: axon_deleteProject
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Delete an existing Axon project and all its stored data.

name.description: The name of the project to delete

languageModelTools.name: axon_deleteDocuments
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove specific document(s) from the active project using their IDs.

docIds.description: List of document IDs to delete

languageModelTools.name: axon_getCollection
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all ingested files and total chunk counts in the active project.

languageModelTools.name: axon_clearCollection
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Wipe all data from the active project's vector store and index.

languageModelTools.name: axon_updateSettings
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Modify Axon RAG settings (top_k, threshold, hybrid, etc.) globally for the current session.

languageModelTools.name: axon_listShares
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all active shares for the current user. Returns 'sharing' (projects this user has shared with others, with revocation status) and 'shared' (projects others have shared with this user, with mount names). Use to audit access or troubleshoot missing shared projects.

axon.apiBase.description: Base URL of the Axon REST API server.

axon.apiKey.description: Optional API key for Axon (matches RAG_API_KEY on the server). Set this in your User settings (not Workspace) to avoid committing secrets to source control.

axon.topK.description: Number of knowledge base chunks to retrieve per query.

axon.autoStart.description: Automatically start the Axon API server when VS Code opens (Linux/macOS).

axon.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter that has Axon installed.

axon.useCopilotLlm.description: Use GitHub Copilot's Language Model as the primary LLM provider for Axon. This enables RAPTOR and GraphRAG ingestion without needing a local Ollama instance.

axon.ingestBase.description: Restrict ingestion to paths under this directory (sets RAG_INGEST_BASE on the server). Leave empty to allow any local path (default). Set to a specific directory to limit where the server can read files from.

axon.storeBase.description: Base path for AxonStore (e.g. /data or ~/axon-data). When set, all projects are stored under <storeBase>/AxonStore/<os-username>/. Leave empty for single-user mode (~/.axon/projects).
